name: MainStreet Bancshares, Inc.
summary: PART I As used herein, the Company, we, our, and us refer to MainStreet Bancshares, Inc., and the Bank refers to MainStreet Bank. Overview MainStreet Bancshares, Inc. is a financial holding company that owns 100% of MainStreet Bank and MainStreet Community Capital, LLC. On October 12, 2021, the Company filed an election to be a financial holding company with the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the Federal Reserve).
